title: WIP - refactor libpod config into libpod/config
body: I'll update the PR description once it's ready for review. At the moment, I only want to throw it at the CI.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
The CI failures for now seem to be unrelated. We're facing issues with seccomp at the moment.

I think we're hitting the regression in selinux, @rhatdan WDYT?
```
[+0064s] # time="2019-10-28T07:51:07-04:00" level=debug msg="Started container 2fa2817b46386328bd38851677609d6bbfb297057afcec6d51003338690ca557"
[+0064s] # Error relocating /lib/ld-musl-x86_64.so.1: RELRO protection failed: Permission denied
[+0064s] # Error relocating /bin/true: RELRO protection failed: Permission denied
```
Although it's odd that https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4350 for instance passes ...
Replaced by https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4352 to rule out some potential sources for the CI failures.
